channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Global geopolitical news headlines from Tier 1 sources

item.title: 🇨🇦 Saskatchewan Marshals Service Poaching Officers from RCMP and Municipal Police Forces
item.description: New provincial marshal service accused of draining talent from existing RCMP and municipal police as it builds its ranks, with 25 of 27 officers reportedly recruited from other forces.

item.title: 🇮🇳 Indias Opposition Demands Government Absorb Oil Price Shock to Protect Growth
item.description: Congress party urges government to shield consumers from rising fuel costs rather than passing them on, warning that higher prices would hurt demand and slow economic growth.

item.title: 🇨🇦 Canadas Mark Carney Champions Alliance of Mid-Level Powers to Counter US Protectionism
item.description: Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carneys push for a coalition of mid-sized economies faces the reality of deep North American trade dependence as Trumps protectionism reshapes global commerce.

item.title: 🛢️ Global Oil Inventories Headed Toward Multi-Decade Lows as Iran War Drains Stockpiles
item.description: US Energy Information Administration warns that oil stockpiles in major economies are on track for their lowest levels since 2003 as Iran conflict cuts output at record pace.

item.title: ⚔️ US Launches Retaliatory Strikes on Iran After Apache Helicopter Downed Near Strait of Hormuz
item.description: US Central Command launched strikes on Iran in response to the downing of an Apache helicopter, calling it a proportional response to Iranian aggression. The pilots were safely rescued.

item.title: ⚔️ Russian Military Official Killed in Car Bombing Near Moscow
item.description: A car explosion in a residential area for military personnel outside Moscow killed one person. Ukrainian media reports suggest the victim was a Russian military figure.

item.title: ⛪ France Condemns Attacks on Christians in East Jerusalem
item.description: France condemned attacks on Christians in East Jerusalem, calling for respect of religious sites amid ongoing tensions in the region.

item.title: 🌐 Japan Seeks Bigger Role in Asia Subsea Cable Networks as AI Rewires Demand
item.description: Japan is positioning itself for a larger role in Asias subsea cable infrastructure as artificial intelligence drives unprecedented demand for data connectivity.

item.title: ⚽ White House Defends World Cup Visa Bans for Iranian Officials and Somali Referee
item.description: White House World Cup task force chief defended visa restrictions for some Iranian team staff and a Somali referee, citing security concerns while emphasizing no players or coaches were denied.

item.title: 🇪🇺 EU Announces Fresh Sanctions Package Banning Russian Soldiers From Entering Bloc
item.description: European Union proposed its 21st sanctions package targeting Russias banks and proposing comprehensive visa bans for current and former Russian military personnel.

item.title: 🛢️ Rising Fuel Prices Hit US Farms as Iran War Drags On
item.description: US farmers are feeling the impact of rising fuel costs as the Iran conflict continues, with gasoline prices hitting farm operations across the country.

item.title: ⚔️ Israeli Military Issues Evacuation Order for Lebanons Tyre Including Christian Areas
item.description: Israeli military issued evacuation orders for the Lebanese city of Tyre, including Christian neighborhoods, as regional tensions continue.

item.title: 🏛️ Congress Debates Immigration Enforcement Funding as Border Policies Remain Contentious
item.description: House Republicans unveiled legislation to increase immigration enforcement funding, continuing debates over border security policies.

item.title: 🏭 Hanwha Qcells Launches First Fully Onshore US Solar Supply Chain
item.description: South Korean company Hanwha Qcells opened the first fully onshore solar panel supply chain in the United States, marking a shift in renewable energy manufacturing.

item.title: 📄 UN Report Exposes Brutal Reality for Palestinians in Gaza and West Bank
item.description: UN investigation documented systematic human rights violations against Palestinians by Israeli forces and settlers in Gaza and the West Bank.

item.title: 🇩🇰 Danish Auditors Fault Defense Ministry for Failing to Disclose Soaring US F-35 Costs
item.description: Danish auditors criticized the defense ministry for not disclosing the rising costs of US F-35 fighter jets, raising questions about transparency in military procurement.

item.title: 💨 Japans Mitsubishi and Canadas Brookfield to Buy European Wind and Solar Farms in AI Play
item.description: Mitsubishi and Brookfield announced plans to acquire European renewable energy assets as tech companies race to secure power for AI infrastructure.

item.title: ⚔️ Trump Confirms US Pilots Safe After Helicopter Downed Near Strait of Hormuz
item.description: President Trump confirmed that the two pilots from a US Apache helicopter downed near the Strait of Hormuz were safe and rescued, vowing a response.

item.title: 💰 EU Proposes 21st Sanctions Package Targeting Russias Banks
item.description: European Union proposed its latest round of sanctions against Russia, targeting banking institutions and strengthening enforcement measures.

item.title: ⛽ Trump Approval Near Record Low as Most Americans Expect Higher Gas Prices
item.description: President Trumps approval ratings remain near record lows as most Americans expect gasoline prices to continue rising amid the Iran conflict.

item.title: 🏥 Nigeria Cholera Outbreak Kills Dozens in Borno State
item.description: Cholera outbreak in Nigerias Borno state has killed dozens of people, overwhelming medical facilities in Maiduguri.

item.title: 🐟 Russia Faces Ban on Cod Exports Under New EU Sanctions
item.description: European Union is considering banning Russian cod exports as part of its latest sanctions package targeting Russian economy.

item.title: 🌍 Why Strongmen Are Wrong to Loathe Europe
item.description: Analysis explores why authoritarian leaders misread European unity and why Europes model remains resilient despite global challenges.

item.title: ⚔️ Iran-Israel Crisis Live Updates: Fragile Truce Tested as Regional Tensions Persist
item.description: Live coverage of ongoing Middle East crisis as Iran and Israel maintain a fragile truce following recent hostilities, with Trump pushing for a peace deal.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine Signs Defense Agreements with Latvia and Estonia at Nordic-Baltic Summit
item.description: President Zelenskyy met with Nordic and Baltic leaders in Tallinn, signing drone cooperation agreements and strengthening defense ties with Latvia and Estonia.
